item.title: PC to Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: PC to Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
PC to Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Freely available PC to Mobile SMS Software. PC to Mobile SMS Software transmit business driven messages. Want to share messages to your friends, family members? Start using PC to Mobile SMS Software which is easily available on website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com at affordable price. Now download PC to Mobile SMS Software from website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com which consists of advance techniques helps to select thousands of contact numbers at same time and delivers bulk number of messages without any broadband connection required. With the help of PC to Mobile SMS Software which is cheaply available on developer’s website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com, you can easily compose and transfer text messages across worldwide location in just limited time without any need of programming skills to apply. Program successfully load contacts names and numbers from excel sheet and skips duplicate entries.

[read more]

(Chat & Messenging)
Freely available PC to Mobile SMS Software. PC to Mobile SMS Software transmit business driven messages. Want to share messages to your friends, family members? Now download PC to Mobile SMS Software from website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com which consists of advance techniques helps to select thousands of contact numbers at same time and delivers bulk number of messages without any broadband connection required. With the help of PC to Mobile SMS Software which is cheaply available on developer’s website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com, you can easily compose and transfer text messages across worldwide location in just limited time without any need of programming skills to apply. Program successfully load contacts names and numbers from excel sheet and skips duplicate entries.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
PC to Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Freely available PC to Mobile SMS Software. PC to Mobile SMS Software transmit business driven messages. Want to share messages to your friends, family members? Start using PC to Mobile SMS Software which is easily available on website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com at affordable price. Now download PC to Mobile SMS Software from website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com which consists of advance techniques helps to select thousands of contact numbers at same time and delivers bulk number of messages without any broadband connection required. With the help of PC to Mobile SMS Software which is cheaply available on developer’s website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com, you can easily compose and transfer text messages across worldwide location in just limited time without any need of programming skills to apply. Program successfully load contacts names and numbers from excel sheet and skips duplicate entries.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone
(Chat & Messenging)
SMS software to send business advertisement. Bulk SMS sending application compose unlimited interview and events alerts. Just click on website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to install Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone that is simplest way to send mass number of text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps. Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone is perfect and convenient mode to communicate with your family members, relatives, colleagues, business clients and more through delivering group text messages and notification worldwide without any internet connection. www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com recommends SMS tool which uses delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk text messaging and alerts broadcasting.

[read more]

Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone is perfect and convenient mode to communicate with your family members, relatives, colleagues, business clients and more through delivering group text messages and notification worldwide without any internet connection. www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com recommends SMS tool which uses delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk text messaging and alerts broadcasting.

item.title: Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Are you looking for best, fastest and easily affordable application for sending message from your own pc? Just does a simple mouse click on www.bulksmsgroup.com to download Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile that supports all models of android cell phone of major manufactures like Nokia, HTC and many other to broadcast SMS in minimal time period.

[read more]

item.title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: itzselenux
item.itunes:summary:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]
item.description:

- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]

item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: appsporter

RisingOS Settings Clone
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

item.title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: redmitoto-link
item.itunes:summary:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.description:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.description:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
